label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this problem step by step. So, there are five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They start with specific positions and then swap a bunch of times. My job is to figure out where Eve ends up at the end of the match. Let me write down the initial assignments first. Initial positions: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Center Midfielder - Claire: Right Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me list them out one by one. First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So Dave was Left Winger, Eve was Goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes Goalkeeper and Eve becomes Left Winger. Let me note that down. After first swap: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Center Midfielder - Claire: Right Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. Claire was Right Midfielder, Bob was Center Midfielder. After swapping, Claire becomes Center Midfielder and Bob becomes Right Midfielder. After second swap: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice was Fullback, Bob was Right Midfielder. After swapping, Alice becomes Right Midfielder and Bob becomes Fullback. After third swap: - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions. Eve was Left Winger, Dave was Goalkeeper. After swapping, Eve becomes Goalkeeper and Dave becomes Left Winger. After fourth swap: - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions. Bob was Fullback, Alice was Right Midfielder. After swapping, Bob becomes Right Midfielder and Alice becomes Fullback. After fifth swap: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper So, at the end of the match, Eve is playing Goalkeeper. Let me check if I did each swap correctly. First swap: Dave and Eve. Yes, their positions changed. Second swap: Claire and Bob. Yes. Third swap: Alice and Bob. Yes. Fourth swap: Eve and Dave. Yes. Fifth swap: Bob and Alice. Yes. Therefore, the answer is (E) goalkeeper. Wait, but let me double-check each step to be sure. Let me go through the swaps again. Start with initial positions. After Dave and Eve swap, Dave is Goalkeeper, Eve is Left Winger. Then Claire and Bob swap, so Claire is Center Midfielder, Bob is Right Midfielder. Then Alice and Bob swap: Alice becomes Right Midfielder, Bob becomes Fullback. Then Eve and Dave swap: Eve becomes Goalkeeper, Dave becomes Left Winger. Then Bob and Alice swap: Bob becomes Right Midfielder (since Alice is swapping back?), no.
